home.heroPara: BerryDesign is a small studio for brands that want to look serious on the web — fast, accessible, and built for SEO from the first pixel.
home.service0Desc: Visual systems with personality and rigor.
home.ctaPara: We take on a small number of projects each quarter. Tell us about yours — we usually reply within 24 hours.

about.label: About
about.heroPara1: Berry Design Studio is a specialised web design agency focused on one thing: helping schools and nurseries turn their websites into real enrolment channels.
about.heroPara2: Most education websites fail at the only thing that matters — converting visitors into parent inquiries. They look outdated, load slowly, confuse users, and don't build trust. That directly impacts how parents perceive your institution.
about.whatWeDoHeading: Websites built around how parents think
about.whatWeDoPara1: We design and build websites specifically for schools and nurseries in Qatar. Not generic business websites. Not templates recycled from other industries.
about.whatWeDoItem2: What makes them trust a school
about.whatWeDoConclusion: The result is a website that doesn't just "exist" — it works.
about.approachIntro: We don't start with design. Before anything is built, we define:
about.approachItem0Desc: How your school stands apart from competitors in the Qatar market.
about.approachItem1Desc: What they search for, what they worry about, and what makes them call.
about.approachItem2Desc: The things that make families choose you over the school down the road.
about.approachItem3Desc: Pages, flows, and CTAs designed around how parents actually behave.
about.approachConclusion: Then we translate that into a clean, fast, mobile-first website that is easy to navigate and built to convert.
about.whyPara1: Most agencies try to serve everyone. That leads to average results.
about.whyPara2: We chose to focus on education because:
about.whyItem0: The decision-making process of parents is unique
about.whyItem1: Trust is more important than design trends
about.whyItem2: Messaging must be clear, simple, and reassuring
about.whyConclusion: This focus allows us to build websites that actually match how parents think and behave.
about.differentHeading: The five things that set us apart
about.differentItem0Title: Built for results, not just visuals
about.differentItem0Desc: Every design decision is tested against one question: will this get more parents to call?
about.differentItem1Desc: We know Ramadan intake cycles, dual-language expectations, and why WhatsApp matters more than email.
about.differentItem2Desc: 80% of Qatar parents browse on their phones. Your site is designed for that screen first.
about.differentItem3Desc: We simplify programme pages, fees, and admissions processes so parents get answers instantly.
about.differentItem4Desc: Strategy comes before design. The site is planned to convert before a single pixel is drawn.
about.expectItem0: A professional website aligned with your brand
about.expectItem1: Clear presentation of your programmes and facilities
about.expectItem2: A structure that encourages parent inquiries
about.goalHeading: Help your school attract more parents, starting online.
about.goalPara: If your current website is outdated, underperforming, or not bringing results, it's time to fix the problem at its core.

services.title: Services
services.label: Services
services.heading: What we
services.intro: We work across brand, design, and engineering — usually together. Below is what an engagement typically looks like.
services.service0Desc: Logos, type systems, and visual languages that hold up across every touchpoint.
services.service1Desc: Editorial, motion-rich layouts designed in Figma and prototyped to feel.
services.service2Desc: Production-grade React + Next.js builds. Static, fast, accessible.
services.service3Desc: Technical SEO baked in, plus content systems that compound over time.
services.ctaPara: Most projects we take on don't fit a tidy box. Tell us what you're thinking and we'll figure it out together.
